task_completion.description: Load the ToothGrowth.csv dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP interface should be open, displaying the Tooth Growth dataset in the data view with columns 'len', 'supp', and 'dose'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'dose' variable as an ordinal type
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP data view, the icon next to the 'dose' column header should indicate an ordinal variable (typically an icon with ordered bars, rather than a ruler for scale or Venn diagram for nominal).

task_completion.description: Set up Descriptives analysis for 'len' split by 'supp' and 'dose'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Descriptives control panel, the 'len' variable should be placed in the 'Variables' box, and both 'supp' and 'dose' should be placed in the 'Split' box.

task_completion.description: Select Mean, Standard Deviation, and 95% Confidence Interval for the Mean
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Statistics section of the Descriptives panel, the checkboxes for 'Mean', 'Std. Deviation', and 'Confidence Interval for Mean' (set to 95%) must be checked. The generated results table should display these specific metrics.

task_completion.description: Create a raincloud plot using a colorblind-friendly palette
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Plots section of the Descriptives panel, 'Raincloud plots' (or a combination of Violin, Box, and Jitter plots) must be selected. The color palette dropdown should be set to a colorblind-friendly option. The results panel must display the generated raincloud plot.

task_completion.description: Save the completed analysis as ToothGrowth_Raincloud.jasp
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'ToothGrowth_Raincloud.jasp' in the /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ directory, or the main JASP window title bar displaying 'ToothGrowth_Raincloud.jasp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the JASP application window, menus, and control panels, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The results and plots were genuinely generated by JASP
integrity.visual_evidence: The descriptive statistics table and raincloud plot should be rendered natively within the JASP right-hand results panel in its standard APA-style formatting.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or terminal shortcut to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent running a Python or R script in the terminal to generate the .jasp file directly without opening the JASP application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth_Raincloud.jasp. The dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv. The required analysis is 'Descriptives'. The target variable is 'len', which must be split by both 'supp' and 'dose'. The 'dose' variable must be configured as an 'ordinal' type. Required statistics are Mean, Standard Deviation, and 95% Confidence Interval for the Mean. Required plots are Raincloud plots (or a combination of Violin, Box, and Jitter plots) using a colorblind-friendly palette.
